steps.title: Set equations equal
steps.content: Since both equations equal $y$, set the right sides equal to each other: $$-\frac{1}{7}x = \frac{1}{5}x$$

steps.title: Rearrange and solve
steps.content: Move all terms to one side: $$-\frac{1}{7}x - \frac{1}{5}x = 0$$ Factor out $x$: $$x\left(-\frac{1}{7} - \frac{1}{5}\right) = 0$$ Since the coefficient $-\frac{1}{7} - \frac{1}{5}$ is nonzero, the only solution is $x = 0$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
